variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16734 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16734 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16734 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27999 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16734
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF27999 secondary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
